_meta.notes: Warehaus job postings live at /job/{slug}/. Typical structure: title H1, location/department/type sidebar facts, role overview prose, responsibilities bullets, qualifications/requirements bullets, benefits bullets, and an apply CTA.

prompt: Extract a warehausae.com job posting. Capture role title, the location/department/employment-type facts, the role overview prose, and the bulleted lists for responsibilities, requirements/qualifications, and benefits. Preserve the apply URL if present.
systemPrompt: Extracting one job posting from warehausae.com. Use null or empty arrays for missing fields. Do not invent benefits or requirements.

title.description: Job title shown in the H1.

location.description: Job location (e.g. 'York, PA', 'Remote', 'Hybrid'). May be missing.

posted_date.description: Date posted, as displayed. Preserve the literal string.

overview.description: Role overview / intro prose, joined with double newlines.

apply_url.description: URL or mailto behind an 'Apply' button if present.

apply_email.description: Email to send applications to, if displayed.
